author: smuzaffar
body:
[FastTrackerRecHitMatcher.cc](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/FastSimulation/TrackingRecHitProducer/plugins/FastTrackerRecHitMatcher.cc) is force casting a `StackGeomDet` object to `GluedGeomDet` [here](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/FastSimulation/TrackingRecHitProducer/plugins/FastTrackerRecHitMatcher.cc#L151). In UBSAN IBs, this is flaged as runtime error [a]. Note that both [StackGeomDet](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/Geometry/CommonTopologies/interface/StackGeomDet.h) and [GluedGeomDet](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/Geometry/CommonTopologies/interface/GluedGeomDet.h) have same interface as [DoubleSensGeomDet](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/Geometry/CommonTopologies/interface/DoubleSensGeomDet.h) . This PR proposes to use `DoubleSensGeomDet` as base class for `StackGeomDet` and `GluedGeomDet` and then use `DoubleSensGeomDet` in [FastTrackerRecHitMatcher.cc](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/FastSimulation/TrackingRecHitProducer/plugins/FastTrackerRecHitMatcher.cc) . This should fix the UBSAN runtime error.

[a]
https://cmssdt.cern.ch/SDT/jenkins-artifacts/ubsan_logs/CMSSW_17_0_X_2026-05-15-2300/
https://cmssdt.cern.ch/SDT/cgi-bin/logreader/el8_amd64_gcc13/CMSSW_17_0_UBSAN_X_2026-05-15-2300/pyRelValMatrixLogs/run/36434.0_TTbar_14TeV+Run4D110FS/step2_TTbar_14TeV+Run4D110FS.log#/
```
src/FastSimulation/TrackingRecHitProducer/plugins/FastTrackerRecHitMatcher.cc:338:54: runtime error: member call on address 0x15096ad191e0 which does not point to an object of type 'GluedGeomDet'
0x15096ad191e0: note: object is of type 'StackGeomDet'
 00 00 00 00  e8 28 79 94 0a 15 00 00  00 fb d1 6a 09 15 00 00  54 64 90 18 ff ff ff ff  f1 49 00 00
              ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
              vptr for 'StackGeomDet'
```
```
src/FastSimulation/TrackingRecHitProducer/plugins/FastTrackerRecHitMatcher.cc:202:50: runtime error: member call on address 0x15096abf0600 which does not point to an object of type 'GluedGeomDet'
0x15096abf0600: note: object is of type 'StackGeomDet'
 09 15 00 00  e8 28 79 94 0a 15 00 00  00 c8 c2 6a 09 15 00 00  1c 34 1c 1a ff ff ff ff  7f 58 00 00
              ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
              vptr for 'StackGeomDet'
```
```
src/FastSimulation/TrackingRecHitProducer/plugins/FastTrackerRecHitMatcher.cc:338:54: runtime error: member call on address 0x15096ad191e0 which does not point to an object of type 'GluedGeomDet'
0x15096ad191e0: note: object is of type 'StackGeomDet'
 00 00 00 00  e8 28 79 94 0a 15 00 00  00 fb d1 6a 09 15 00 00  54 64 90 18 ff ff ff ff  f1 49 00 00
              ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
              vptr for 'StackGeomDet'
```
title: UBSAN: use DoubleSensGeomDet as base for Glued/Stack GeomDet
